entities.name: app_identities
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id required and unique login hashes are tenant-scoped
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/update by tenant_id, identity_id or contact hash in D1

entities.name: auth_credentials
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus identity_id foreign key and active credential index
entities.crudLevelDeclared: append/revoke credential hashes by tenant_id and identity_id in D1

entities.name: auth_sessions
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus identity_id foreign key, token hashes, expiration and revocation indexes
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/revoke sessions by tenant_id, hash and expiration in D1

entities.name: app_users
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus identity_id and access_profile_id boundaries
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/update user status by tenant_id and app_user_id in D1

entities.name: access_profiles
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id scoped profiles with unique profile_key per tenant
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/update profiles by tenant_id and profile_key in D1

entities.name: permissions
entities.tenantIsolation: global catalog only, joined through tenant-scoped profile grants
entities.crudLevelDeclared: read permission catalog by permission_key in D1

entities.name: access_profile_permissions
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus profile and permission foreign keys
entities.crudLevelDeclared: grant/revoke permissions by tenant_id and profile_id in D1

entities.name: identity_audit_events
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus identity_id/app_user_id references for sensitive access events
entities.crudLevelDeclared: append/read audit events by tenant_id and occurred_at in D1

securityContract.credentialStorage: Only strong salted credential hashes are stored; plaintext credentials are outside this schema and must never be persisted.
securityContract.sessionStorage: Only access and refresh token hashes are stored, with explicit expiration, refresh expiration, rotation and revocation fields.
securityContract.frontendBoundary: Microfrontends never access D1 directly; the backend cycle must expose session and permission contracts through Workers only.

acceptanceEvidenceRequired: GitHub Actions plus Cloudflare D1-backed migration, rollback and negative fixture run before moving this cycle to concluido.
